overview.description: The BondBloxx B-Rated USD High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (XB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index that specifically invests in USD-denominated corporate bonds with a credit rating of B (or its equivalent), based on an average of three main credit rating providers. XB was launched on May 24, 2022 and is issued by BondBloxx.
infoTable: ICE BofA Single-B US Cash Pay High Yield Constrained Index
